name: Set Parent
description: Reparents target objects while optionally preserving world transform.
author: stemstudio
documentation:
## Set Parent

Reparents target objects while optionally preserving world transform.

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `parentUUID` | Parent UUID | `string` | `` | - |
| `keepWorldTransform` | Keep World Transform | `boolean` | `true` | - |
